chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُعَاوَضَةِ فِي الْحَيَوَانِ وَ الثِّيَابِ وَ غَيْرِ ذَلِكَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 81 – The bartering regarding the animals and the clothes and other than that

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/201)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/201)

parts.text: أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) لَا يَبِيعُ رَاحِلَةً عَاجِلًا بِعَشَرَةِ مَلَاقِيحَ مِنْ أَوْلَادِ جَمَلٍ

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> (having said): ‘You cannot Sell one live riding camel with ten foetuses from the children of the camel in the future’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu Najran from ‘Asim ibn Humayd from Muhammad ibn Qays who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The sale of one grown up camel in exchange for ten fetuses of camel to be born is not valid.’”
